{"status_code":0,"comments":[{"cid":"7448323454506877706","text":"另外，还有一个问题，其实在软件层有并行与并发的区别。都是针对线程的不同的包装。一个叫parallel,一个叫Concurrency。这是编程要注意的。对系统来说也有这个概念，一个表示多核心同时运行，一个表示任务在不同时间片交叉运行。也就是说代码中的线程造成不跨过系统讲线程。否则造成很大麻烦，其实只需要解释编程其实是调用系统的dll，或者对dll再次打包。而new thread并没有使用dll打包线程，start才是利用dll打包了线程到内存中。这样分开编程中的线程概念与系统中线程概念。而系统除了线程还有进程概念。系统中的并行才是指的进程。其实上系统中除了线程还有纤程概念。对于线程，多线程，线程间通信，进程间通信等等，没有良好的系统基础，程序这方面是做不到完美的。即便开发工具给了大量程序员不需要理解的知识，这反倒让程序员遇到这类问题根本就不知道哪儿出了问题。虽然他们能写好线程的相关编程问题，一旦遇到问题，基本上无所适从。","aweme_id":"7448118827402972455","create_time":1734212440,"digg_count":5,"status":1,"user":{"uid":"109201297107","short_id":"1997307764","nickname":"用户3439801425229","avatar_thumb":{"uri":"100x100/aweme-avatar/aweme_default_avatar.png","url_list":["https://p3.douyinpic.com/aweme/100x100/aweme-avatar/aweme_default_avatar.png.heic?from=2064092626&se=false&biz_tag=aweme_comment&l=202604261150209FC6D8A52B66DADCBB55","https://p9.douyinpic.com/aweme/100x100/aweme-avatar/aweme_default_avatar.png.heic?from=2064092626&se=false&biz_tag=aweme_comment&l=202604261150209FC6D8A52B66DADCBB55","https://p6.douyinpic.com/aweme/100x100/aweme-avatar/aweme_default_avatar.png.heic?from=2064092626&se=false&biz_tag=aweme_comment&l=202604261150209FC6D8A52B66DADCBB55","https://p3.douyinpic.com/aweme/100x100/aweme-avatar/aweme_default_avatar.png.jpeg?from=2064092626&se=false&biz_tag=aweme_comment&l=202604261150209FC6D8A52B66DADCBB55"],"width":720,"height":720},"unique_id":"","is_ad_fake":false,"followers_detail":null,"region":"CN","commerce_user_level":0,"platform_sync_info":null,"secret":0,"geofencing":null,"cover_url":null,"item_list":null,"new_story_cover":null,"type_label":null,"ad_cover_url":null,"relative_users":null,"cha_list":null,"sec_uid":"MS4wLjABAAAAFbgfAIlvflslRNaNQRSEyY4rX_hNvam2XXG7V0FDyjI","need_points":null,"homepage_bottom_toast":null,"can_set_geofencing":null,"white_cover_url":null,"user_tags":null,"ban_user_functions":[],"card_entries":null,"display_info":null,"card_entries_not_display":null,"card_sort_priority":null,"interest_tags":null,"link_item_list":null,"user_permissions":null,"offline_info_list":null,"signature_extra":null,"personal_tag_list":null,"cf_list":null,"im_role_ids":null,"not_seen_item_id_list":null,"follower_list_secondary_inf gged":true,"user_buried":false,"label_list":[{"type":20,"text":"作者赞过"}],"is_hot":false,"text_music_info":null,"image_list":null,"is_note_comment":0,"ip_label":"陕西","can_share":true,"level":2,"comment_reply_total":13,"video_list":null,"content_type":1,"is_folded":false,"comment_token":"MS4wLjAAAAAArLf9UMzVBW3R9qrgHBh46B9TIhmQF4l_Q7lluN4zC37q7cqG8mMG01LLCJMC2YvdLvbaknAxBmpggWNI_DRNyRkZ8xIwzlVrbDNSVp0ZfJASYeSD26RGz_f5T2TztlEx6EjqAF42umi_fvQuZwUMoQRW_AkxtSPD4E9QdDe_wxhfVHPdsvutzjXFV505wuZZCCopV1_tRKyxgsRjNgFBJXiXfKvToXuUUj6P92xy4GswmhfVVF1vah47LhQ75839","decorated_emoji_info":null,"merge_comment_label":null},{"cid":"7448330636340806451","text":"另外有一个好玩的事儿，一般程序员会迷糊，你使用代码new thread开辟的线程，其实是一个包，就是一段等待执行的代码。这个叫线程。CPU内核心数，有个核心提供两个线程(E核心提供一个），这个能提供的工作线程，相当于把一个CPU核心分成两个虚拟CPU核心。而系统中的线程与代码中开辟的线程双是两码事，就是把你的要执行的代码段（线程）装入到一个壳内（线程），然后由CPU调用。换句话来说这里的线程的意思相当于一辆汽车来装你的代码（线程），这个装你段码段的汽车也叫线程。所以硬件中的线程，系统中的线程，代码中的线程根本就是三个不同的概念。对于程序员来说，经常涉及到系统线程与代码中的线程打交道，所以把系统中的线程也工作线程，用于和代码中的thread进行区别。很多人根本讲不清系统线程和代码线程的区别，或者根本就没有注意到。讲个例子来说，new thread仅表示你建了一个线程，而thread.start才是真正开辟了线程。此时thread才会有线程ID。而该线程被线程调入之后，通过其他手段才知道线程工作在哪个CPU核心上（单核除外）。","aweme_id":"7448118827402972455","create_time":1734211403,"digg_count":3,"status":1,"user":{"uid":"109201297107","short_id":"1997307764","nickname":"用户3439801425229","avatar_thumb":{"uri":"100x100/aweme-avatar/aweme_default_avatar.png","url_list":["https://p3.douyinpic.com/aweme/100x100/aweme-avatar/aweme_default_avatar.png.heic?from=2064092626&se=false&biz_tag=aweme_comment&l=202604261150209FC6D8A52B66DADCBB55","https://p9.douyinpic.com/aweme/100x100/aweme-avatar/aweme_default_avatar.png.heic?from=2064092626&se=false&biz_tag=aweme_comment&l=202604261150209FC6D8A52B66DADCBB55","https://p6.douyinpic.com/aweme/100x100/aweme-avatar/aweme_default_avatar.png.heic?from=2064092626&se=false&biz_tag=aweme_comment&l=202604261150209FC6D8A52B66DADCBB55","https://p3.douyinpic.com/aweme/100x100/aweme-avatar/aweme_default_avatar.png.jpeg?from=2064092626&se=false&biz_tag=aweme_comment&l=202604261150209FC6D8A52B66DADCBB55"],"width":720,"height":720},"unique_id":"","is_ad_fake":false,"followers_detail":null,"region":"CN","commerce_user_level":0,"platform_sync_info":null,"secret":0,"geofencing":null,"cover_url":null,"item_list":null,"new_story_cover":null,"type_label":null,"ad_cover_url":null,"relative_users":null,"cha_list":null,"sec_uid":"MS4wLjABAAAAFbgfAIlvflslRNaNQRSEyY4rX_hNvam2XXG7V0FDyjI","need_points":null,"homepage_bottom_toast":null,"can_set_geofencing":null,"white_cover_url":null,"user_tags":null,"ban_user_functions":[],"card_entries":null,"display_info":null,"card_entries_not_display":null,"card_sort_priority":null,"interest_tags":null,"link_item_list":null,"user_permissions":null,"offline_info_list":null,"signature_extra":null,"personal_tag_list":null,"cf_list":null,"im_role_ids":null,"not_seen_item_id_list":null,"follower_list_secondary_information_struct":null,"endorsement_info_list":null,"text_extra":null,"contrail_list":null,"data_label_list":null,"not_seen_item_id_list
